title: pyparallax: Python library for parallax correction with Fortran extension
description: pyparallax is a Python library for performing parallax correction on satellite imagery, particularly useful for correcting the apparent displacement of clouds and other elevated features in geostationary satellite observations. The library includes optimized Fortran extensions for computational efficiency.
